title: Power Flow Change Characteristics Analysis and Path Optimization of Interconnected Power Grid based on Machine Learning
venue: 2025 2nd International Conference on Software, Systems and Information Technology (SSITCON)
snippet: This study constructed a hybrid framework that integrates spatiotemporal feature extraction and deep reinforcement learning. First, a multi-scale spatiotemporal convolutional network was used to analyze power flow data containing wind power/photovoltaic power output fluctuations and sudden load changes. Dynamic pattern decomposition was used to extract 12-dimensional spatiotemporal feature vectors. A graph neural network based on a dual-attention mechanism was then designed to model the dynamic
